title: Send a typed question and receive a bot response
description: Verifies a user can type a question, submit it, see their message appear, and receive a bot response rendered in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill "Apa jurusan yang tersedia?" into the chat input
Press Enter
Wait for the bot response to render
Verify the conversation shows the user message followed by a bot response

title: Discover campus info and reach chat with theme preserved
description: Verifies a visitor can browse accordions on the landing page, toggle the theme, navigate to the chat page via CTA, and see the chosen theme persist.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme
Open a campus information accordion item
Close the campus information accordion item
Open a FAQ accordion item
Close the FAQ accordion item
Click the call-to-action to start chat
Verify the user lands on the chat page and the selected theme is still applied

title: Reset conversation to welcome state after clearing chat
description: Verifies a user can clear an active conversation and the UI returns to the welcome state with no chat bubbles and input reset.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Press Enter to send the message
Wait for the assistant response to appear
Click the clear chat control
Verify the welcome state is displayed and no chat bubbles are shown
Verify the chat input is empty and the send control is disabled

title: Chat shows welcome state and reaches connected status when available
description: Verifies the chat page loads into a welcome/idle state and then displays an online/connected status once initialization completes.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Wait for session initialization to complete
Verify a connected or online status is shown and the chat input is ready for use

title: Theme persists from landing page to chat page
description: Verifies that toggling the theme on the landing page persists when navigating to the chat page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme
Click the call-to-action to start chatting
Verify the selected theme remains active on the chat page

title: Empty message cannot be submitted
description: Verifies the chat prevents sending an empty message by keeping the send control disabled and not appending a new user message.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Focus the chat input with no text
Press Enter
Verify no new user message is added and the send control remains disabled

title: Chat displays offline status when backend is unreachable
description: Verifies the chat page indicates offline mode when it cannot establish a backend session.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Wait for session initialization to complete
Verify an offline status is shown

title: Quick-action chip submits as message and triggers response
description: Verifies a user can select a quick-action topic chip and receive a corresponding bot response in the chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Select a quick action topic chip
Wait for the bot response to render
Verify the selected topic appears as a user message and a bot response is displayed

title: Clearing chat works after multiple messages
description: Verifies clearing chat removes a longer conversation history and restores the initial welcome state.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Press Enter to send the message
Wait for the assistant response to appear
Fill a second short question into the chat input field
Press Enter to send the message
Click the clear chat control
Verify the welcome state is displayed and no chat bubbles are shown

title: Landing page provides a working path to chat via floating entry point
description: Verifies a visitor can use the floating chat entry point on the landing page to reach the chat page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the landing page
Click the floating button that opens the chat
Verify the user lands on the chat page

title: Send button enablement follows input content
description: Verifies the send control becomes enabled when the user types content and returns to disabled when the input is cleared.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill "Tes" into the chat input
Clear the chat input
Verify the send control is disabled when the input is empty

title: User can start a new conversation after clearing chat
description: Verifies that after clearing chat the user can send a new message and see a new conversation begin normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Press Enter to send the message
Wait for the assistant response to appear
Click the clear chat control
Fill a new short question into the chat input field
Press Enter to send the message
Verify a new user message bubble is displayed and an assistant response is shown

title: Use mobile menu to navigate to a section
description: Verifies a visitor can open the mobile navigation menu, select a navigation item, and be taken to the corresponding section on the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Open the mobile menu
Choose a navigation item for a landing-page section
Verify the page is scrolled to the chosen section

title: Typing indicator appears while waiting for a response
description: Verifies the chat shows a typing indicator after message submission and removes it when the bot response is rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill "Biaya kuliah berapa?" into the chat input
Submit the message
Wait for the typing indicator to appear
Wait for the bot response to render
Verify a bot response is displayed and the typing indicator is no longer shown

title: Send stays disabled after clearing until user types again
description: Verifies clearing chat resets input UX so the user cannot send an empty message until they type new content.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Press Enter to send the message
Wait for the assistant response to appear
Click the clear chat control
Click the chat input field
Verify the chat input is empty and the send control is disabled

title: Theme persists after returning from chat to landing
description: Verifies a visitor can toggle the theme, go to chat, return to the landing page using in-app navigation, and still see the theme persisted.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme
Click the call-to-action to start chat
Click the in-app navigation to return to the landing page
Verify the landing page loads with the previously selected theme applied

title: Theme persists after a full page reload
description: Verifies that the chosen theme is stored locally and remains active after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme
Reload the page
Verify the selected theme remains active after reload

title: Theme toggle on chat page switches theme immediately
description: Verifies that the user can toggle the theme within the chat page and the UI updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Toggle the theme
Verify the chat page theme changes to the newly selected mode

title: Theme toggle on landing page switches theme immediately
description: Verifies that the user can toggle the theme within the landing page and the UI updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle the theme
Verify the landing page theme changes to the newly selected mode

title: Accordion interactions are independent across sections
description: Verifies a visitor can open an item in Tentang Kampus and an item in FAQ without breaking accordion behavior in either section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a campus information accordion item
Scroll to the FAQ section
Open a FAQ accordion item
Verify both sections display expanded content for the items that were opened

title: Clearing chat when conversation is already empty keeps welcome state
description: Verifies that clearing chat from the initial state does not break the UI and remains in the welcome state.

steps.description: Navigate to /chat.html
Click the clear chat control
Verify the welcome state is displayed and no chat bubbles are shown
Verify the chat input is empty and the send control is disabled
